2. The `src/collections/` directory - especially `certificates.ts`, `enrollments.ts`, `modules.ts`, `lessons.ts`

7. Any existing test files in `src/app/api/` to understand the testing pattern

- `src/collections/certificates.ts`

- `src/collections/modules.ts`
- `src/collections/lessons.ts`
- `src/services/gradebook-payload.ts` (or similar gradebook service file)\… [+327 chars]

1	# [kody-lean] feat: certificate generation endpoint
2	
3	Add an endpoint that generates a course-completion certificate when a student finishes all lessons in a course.
4	
5	## Endpoint
6
